ops.title: Implement cc-notes viz: live branch-flow + entity-lifecycle web visualization (plan: lets-build-a-visualization-zippy-dragon.md)

ops.text: go test -race -count=1 ./... green in default (no-node) build
cc-notes viz serves timeline + DAG tabs; task mutation from second shell updates page via SSE within ~2s
CI web+webui jobs green; release legs thread web-dist artifact with dist guard and -tags webui
